response.justification: Bogdan is a strong full-stack TypeScript engineer with genuine Staff-level depth and relevant MCP server work at re:cinq, but the role's hard requirement of 8+ years delivering production-grade AI solutions is unmet — his AI-focused work spans roughly 13 months in his current role. Python, RAG architectures, vector databases, and LLM evaluation pipelines are entirely absent from the resume, and cloud platform experience is shallow (AWS CDK at Optilyz). The foundation is solid, but the AI-specific experience gap is too wide for a Staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js engineering across distributed, event-driven, and high-throughput systems spanning 10+ years
Direct Model Context Protocol (MCP) server and agentic workflow development at re:cinq — exactly on the key tech list
Consistent Staff-level technical leadership: mentoring, workshops, public talks, and code-quality advocacy across multiple employers
concerns: Python is absent from the skills list entirely — a critical gap for the AI/ML tooling and data-pipeline work this role demands
No evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI, etc.)
The 8-year minimum for production AI solutions is not met — substantive AI work is limited to the current role (~13 months as of mid-2026)

key_factors.factor: MCP and agentic tooling at re:cinq
